title: saxifraga stolonifera f. leuconeura
intro: Saxifraga stolonifera f. leuconeura, also known as creeping saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the saxifrage family. It is native to East Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, and is often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, Saxifraga stolonifera f. leuconeura is typically used as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
